main.description: A live-rendered telling of one tale from the Book of Sand (borges.mino.mobi). The tale's structure — teller, frame, cast, Propp spine, motifs — is generated deterministically from the page number n; this record holds the prose telling a model rendered from that deterministic spec, cached here so the permalink /t/<n> stays stable for ever. rkey is the page number n as a string.

n.description: The page number; matches the rkey and the deterministic spec.

teller.description: Which of the seven told it (the planet's name).

movements.description: The telling, one entry per movement, in order.

model.description: The inference model that rendered it, e.g. gemini-2.5-flash.
